description: In the Northwind Traders business in Manager.io, record a manual journal entry for an office rent expense dated today. The entry must include a 3000.00 debit to 'Accounting fees' (or 'Advertising and promotion') and a 3000.00 credit to 'Retained earnings' with the narration 'Prepaid office rent Q1'. Credentials: Username = administrator, Password = (leave empty).
